title: GPU Cloud Deployment Without Leaving Your IDE — Audry Hsu, RunPod
summary: Flash is a decorator-based framework for deploying GPU workloads directly from an IDE with hot reload capabilities. It simplifies the deployment cycle by replacing Docker builds and manual GPU allocation with a single @flash.endpoint decorator on Python functions. RunPod provides H100 GPU access at $0.00116 per second with serverless autoscaling options.
writeup: Audry Hsu of RunPod presents Flash, a decorator-based framework for deploying GPU workloads directly from an IDE with hot reload. The approach replaces Docker builds and manual GPU allocation with a single @flash.endpoint decorator placed on Python functions, collapsing the deployment cycle. RunPod backs it with H100 GPU access priced at $0.00116 per second and serverless autoscaling.
